quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.C: A `NumericRangeFilter` filters values that are within the value range.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.A.Description: The aggregation function of the filter.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.C.Description: The column that the filter is applied to.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.F.Description: An identifier that uniquely identifies a filter within a dashboard, analysis, or template.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.I.Description: Determines whether the maximum value in the filter value range should be included in the filtered results.
Determines whether the minimum value in the filter value range should be included in the filtered results.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.N.Description: This option determines how null values should be treated when filtering data.  +  `ALL_VALUES`: Include null values in filtered results.+  `NULLS_ONLY`: Only include null values in filtered results.+  `NON_NULLS_ONLY`: Exclude null values from filtered results.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.R.Description: The maximum value for the filter value range.
The minimum value for the filter value range.

quicksight.template.numericrangefilter.S.Description: Select all of the values. Null is not the assigned value of select all.  +  `FILTER_ALL_VALUES`
